item.title: Is it actually possible to fill a Klein bottle?
item.description: I show you a trick to fill a klein bottle and talk about why it has no volume

media:content.media:title: Is it actually possible to fill a Klein bottle?
media:content.media:description: I show you a trick to fill a klein bottle and talk about why it has no volume

item.title: The world's hottest candle
item.description: I show you the world's hottest candle made with an ultra high frequency tesla coil

media:content.media:title: The world's hottest candle
media:content.media:description: I show you the world's hottest candle made with an ultra high frequency tesla coil

item.title: Magnetic bubbles
item.description: I show you how oxygen is attracted to a magnet because it is paramagnetic

media:content.media:title: Magnetic bubbles
media:content.media:description: I show you how oxygen is attracted to a magnet because it is paramagnetic

item.title: The loudest sound in the quietest room
item.description: In this video, I traveled to 3M to see how silence is science. Watch to see how the quietest room is used to study how sound waves move, which helps build the sound-damping products we use every day.

media:content.media:title: The loudest sound in the quietest room
media:content.media:description: In this video, I traveled to 3M to see how silence is science. Watch to see how the quietest room is used to study how sound waves move, which helps build the sound-damping products we use every day.

item.title: A room made completely out of mirrors
item.description: In this video I show you what happens when you turn off a light in a room made completely out of mirrors

media:content.media:title: A room made completely out of mirrors
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you what happens when you turn off a light in a room made completely out of mirrors

item.title: Holding plasma in my hands
item.description: In this video I show you how to generate a plasma, and talk about why the noble gasses can be turned into plasma so easily, yet are so difficult to ionize.

media:content.media:title: Holding plasma in my hands
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you how to generate a plasma, and talk about why the noble gasses can be turned into plasma so easily, yet are so difficult to ionize.

item.title: Playing with awesome physics projects!!
item.description: A look at fun physics projects that make science easy to explore and learn.

media:content.media:title: Playing with awesome physics projects!!
media:content.media:description: A look at fun physics projects that make science easy to explore and learn.

item.title: Why AC electricity doesn’t behave the way you think
item.description: In this video I talk about why AC currents usually hide a DC bias

media:content.media:title: Why AC electricity doesn’t behave the way you think
media:content.media:description: In this video I talk about why AC currents usually hide a DC bias
